name: First Nations Taxpayer — Form T90 and T4 Box 71 Exempt Income
description: **Complete Thomas Redcrow's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\redcrow\. Include his dependent son Leo, ensure on-reserve income is treated as exempt, and complete Form T90. Save the completed return as 'thomas_redcrow.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.**

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T90 and Section 87 of the Indian Act
metadata.key_complexity: Form T90, Box 71 vs Box 14 distinction, Dependent entry for CCB calculation
